title: MrJoinMessages
description: MrJoinMessages is a plugin that sends messages upon a player's connection/disconnection and Titles/Welcome Message.
body:
---

## 📖 About the Plugin
**MrJoinMessages** is a plugin that sends messages upon a player's **connection/disconnection** and provides **Titles/Welcome Messages**.

---

## ✨ Functions
- Normal **Join/Leave** Messages  
- Random **Join/Leave** Messages  
- Group **Join/Leave** Messages  
- **Welcome Message**  
- **Welcome Title & Subtitle**  
- **Welcome Sounds** (Random, Normal, Group)  
- **Test Commands**  

---

## 🖼️ Plugin Preview
 - Preview images you can find on gallery

---

## ⌨️ Commands

### Admin Commands
- `/mjmc` – For help  
- `/mjm reload` – Reload configuration/messages files  
- `/mjm test Join` – Send join message  
- `/mjm test Leave` – Send leave message  
- `/mjm test Title` – Send title and subtitle  
- `/mjm test Welcome` – Send welcome message  
- `/mjm test Sound` – Play test sound  

---

## 🔑 Permissions

### Commands Permissions
- `mjm.command.reload` – Permission to use `/mjm reload`  
- `mjm.command.test.join` – Permission to use `/mjm test Join`  
- `mjm.command.test.leave` – Permission to use `/mjm test Leave`  
- `mjm.command.test.title` – Permission to use `/mjm test Title`  
- `mjm.command.test.welcome` – Permission to use `/mjm test Welcome`  
- `mjm.command.test.sound` – Permission to use `/mjm test Sound`  

This plugin may have worked since version 1.16.5, but it has never been tested on this version.
This plugin currently is tested on 1.20.x and 1.21.8 and is fully functional. (I don't plan to add support for older versions.)
